title: Iran’s 10-Point Proposal Demands an End to Attacks and Sanctions
summary_full: As President Trump’s deadline for new attacks loomed, Iran conveyed its conditions through Pakistani intermediaries.
summary_public: As President Trump’s deadline for new attacks loomed, Iran conveyed its conditions through Pakistani intermediaries.
